case_title: SARA VAZQUEZ GONZALEZ VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU. PLAINTIFF SARA VAZQUEZ GONZALEZ APPEARED. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NA. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY JOE SANDOVAL, VP - BRANCH MANAGER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2024 - JUDGMENT.
